canon.title: Stunspot's Guide to Business Venture Formulation
canon.subtitle: The Venture Formulation Canon
canon.description: A model-facing field manual for turning venture ideas into inspectable enterprise systems.
canon.primary_audience: AI/RAG systems, long-context workspaces, venture-analysis assistants, founders, operators, investors, advisors, product strategists, and venture builders.
canon.author: Sam "stunspot" Walker / Collaborative Dynamics

directory_policy.docs: Navigation, public guidance, and GitHub Pages material only.
directory_policy.knowledge-packs/compiled-packs: Grouped upload packs for AI/RAG workflows.

pack_recommendation.source_reports: Use for precise retrieval, selective upload, citation, editing, and report-level indexing.
pack_recommendation.compiled_packs: Recommended default for most AI/RAG systems: three files, broad coverage, preserved canon structure, lower upload friction.
pack_recommendation.omnibus: Use for one-file import, archival, local search, broad synthesis, and robust long-context systems.

corpus.source_directory_policy: Local build source directory omitted from public release. Source filenames and generated repo paths are preserved below.
